'''鈭歾-b-n-b''' ('''kazabneboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:danger|danger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:danger|danger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-b-n-b
|-
! Lemma
| kazabneboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabneboko|thizabneboko]] || [[word:jizabneboko|jizabneboko]] || [[word:shizabneboko|shizabneboko]] || [[word:kizabneboko|kizabneboko]]
|-
